stemHtml: When will the surface wind in a METAR record a gust factor?

options.a: With gusts of at least 25 knots.
options.b: With gusts of at least 35 knots.
options.c: When gusts are at least 10 knots above the mean wind speed.
options.d: When gusts are at least 15 knots above the mean wind speed.
